title: Languages
description: In this journey of learning programming, I have learned few tips and tricks. Wanted to share those with you.

title: Blogs
description: I was always told to write down whatever there is that troubles me. It always helps me. Hope you find meaning reading them.

title: Books
description: I have always been a book lover. I read a lot of books and I have a lot of fun doing it. Here are some of the books that I loved.

title: Activity
description: I read papers of all kind. I write down my thoughts on them. I also write down my thoughts on random things that I find interesting.

title: Photos
description: Photography is one of the most beautiful art form. I have been doing it for a while now and I have a lot of fun doing it. Here are some of my photos.

title: Trails
description: I'm not a pro-athlete by any means but I always had this idea of doing adventure. Hiking has always been an affordable way to live that adventure life.
